api_keys.docs_suffix: you can browse the interactive endpoint documentation.

empty.title: No API keys
empty.description: Create your first API key to authenticate external integrations.

create.title: New API key
create.subtitle: Generate a new access key for the API endpoints.

created_dialog.title: API key created
created_dialog.description: Store this key securely. You won't be able to see it again.
created_dialog.warning: This key grants the same access as the user who created it. Keep it secret.

delete.confirm_description: Any integration using this key will stop working.
